name: GTJA-Allianz Shuangxi CSI 100 Index Classified Securities Investment Fund
summary: GTJA-Allianz Shuangxi CSI 100 Index Classified Securities Investment Fund is a fund that tracks the performance of the CSI 100 Index and is structured as a classified or graded fund. The fund aims to provide investors with exposure to the top 100 companies listed on the Shanghai and Shenzhen stock exchanges. It is managed by GTJA-Allianz Fund Management Co., Ltd., a joint venture between Guotai Junan Securities and Allianz.
